title: Cinematic Landing Hero v2
description: Full-page GSAP ScrollTrigger cinematic hero that pins the section for 7000px of scroll, flies a deep-blue card in from below to fill the viewport, reveals an iPhone mockup with counter animation and progress ring, then pulls back and transitions to CTA buttons. Includes mouse-driven 3D tilt, card mouse-light sheen, film grain, grid overlay, and glass badges. Fully configurable via props.
